name: MetLife Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.75% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series F
summary: MetLife Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.75% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series F represents fractional ownership in preferred shares of MetLife. The preferred shares offer a fixed dividend payment. The issuer is MetLife, a global insurance company.
